variants.title: Mann Filter WK 857/1 Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550857
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P550857 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550857 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard FF5800 Fuel Filter, In-Line | Replaces the Donaldson P550857
variants.description: Fleetguard® FF5800 in-line fuel filter ensures optimal fuel system protection from contaminants.
